---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new component or feature
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
---

## Description
What would you like to see added?

## Use Case
How would this be used in a Shopify store?

## Proposed API
```html
<ecom-my-component attribute="value">
</ecom-my-component>
```

## Additional Context
Any mockups, references, or examples.
